nodes.name: Peltops
nodes.summary: Peltops（Peltops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Lowland peltops、Mountain peltops。

nodes.name: Lowland peltops
nodes.summary: Lowland peltops（Peltops blainvillii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Lowland peltops。

nodes.name: Lowland peltops
nodes.summary: The lowland peltops or clicking shieldbill (Peltops blainvillii) is a species of bird in the family Artamidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References External links Image at ADW
